risks.title: Count mismatch between element-iteration and graph-node iteration
risks.mitigation: AC-05b 263===263 is the verification gate. Run frozen-fixture test immediately after change. If counts differ, investigate before committing.

risks.title: graph parameter not available in buildFileHeaderStatusMap signature
risks.mitigation: Check current signature. If only state is passed, may need to also accept graph parameter. buildReport already receives graph — thread it through or refactor call site.

candidates.change: Replace: for (const element of state.elements) loop → for (const node of graph.nodes) loop filtering node.metadata?.fileGrain === true, using node.metadata.headerStatus.

decision_records.rationale: WO-RAG-INDEX-GRAPH-BUILDER-HEADER-STATUS-001 stamped headerStatus on file-grain nodes. graph.nodes is now the canonical file-grain source. Eliminates element-grain iteration outside the analyzer.
headerFact has no graph-node equivalent. Confirmed by v1 Phase 1 audit (commit 6587dca audit-matrix.md). Out of scope.
